tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows elevated HbA1c, indicating suboptimal long-term glycemic control, despite a low current blood glucose, which may suggest recent hypoglycemia or overtreatment. Lipid profile reveals high LDL and low HDL cholesterol, increasing cardiovascular risk. Renal function, electrolytes, and other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend review of diabetes and lipid management, and assessment for hypoglycemia risk.

display.value: Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
